x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Matter volume reflects active legal workload that benefits from Now Assist summarization and AI-assisted status tracking. Adequate matter volume enables AI to identify patterns, flag at-risk matters, and accelerate resolution.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{var t=new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_matter");if(!t.isValid()){return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Required table sn_lg_matter_matter not found",finding:"Legal Matter table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_matter");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matters found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matter(s) found (target: 50+). Limited matter volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI summarization accuracy."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 legal matters",finding:"No legal matters found. Now Assist LSD requires matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure legal matters are being managed through the LSD module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3d
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Matter volume reflects active legal workload that benefits from Now Assist summarization and AI-assisted status tracking. Adequate matter volume enables AI to identify patterns, flag at-risk matters, and accelerate resolution.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Legal Matter Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{var t=new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_matter");if(!t.isValid()){return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Required table sn_lg_matter_matter not found",finding:"Legal Matter table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_matter");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matters found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matter(s) found (target: 50+). Limited matter volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI summarization accuracy."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 legal matters",finding:"No legal matters found. Now Assist LSD requires matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>LSD</module><number>CHK0000589</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure legal matters are being managed through the LSD module.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Legal Matter Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_93f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
